response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years of breadth, currently Staff Software Engineer at Google doing exactly the kind of AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling this role targets. His time at Meta maps directly onto the primary stack (TypeScript, React, MongoDB, AWS), and his current Google work on MCP frameworks and agentic workflows is a rare and strong differentiator. The main gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin, or Playwright experience — but given his depth, adaptability across many stacks, and strong TDD culture, these are learnable rather than disqualifying.
strengths: Directly relevant AI-agent and developer-tooling experience at Google (MCP code generators, agentic workflows) — a rare match for the job's AI agent requirement
Proven full-stack TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB delivery at Meta scale, including AWS CDK and cloud infrastructure
Deep testing and software craftsmanship culture: TDD, trunk-based development, CI/CD, public workshops on testing — aligns tightly with the quality-focused role
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js, which is the primary backend framework in the stack
Kotlin absent from listed skills; Java is present but the secondary backend language requirement is Kotlin-first
No mention of Vitest or Playwright specifically — testing experience is strong but not confirmed on the exact frameworks listed
